headline: Visa’s $700 Billion Payments Empire Faces New Disruption Risks
summary: Visa processed nearly 70 billion transactions in a single quarter, yet something beneath those blockbuster numbers is quietly shrinking the bottom line. Four consecutive quarters of nine-figure litigation charges tell one story, but stablecoins, real-time rails, and digital wallets are writing another.

raw.headline: Visa’s $700 Billion Payments Empire Faces New Disruption Risks
raw.summary: Visa processed nearly 70 billion transactions in a single quarter, yet something beneath those blockbuster numbers is quietly shrinking the bottom line.
